About Me

The Finance Mind Behind the Numbers

I am a senior finance professional and entrepreneur based in Al Nahyan, Abu Dhabi, with 7+ years of progressive experience across the UAE and Pakistan. I currently lead two companies — Imperial Transport LLC (CEO, Abu Dhabi) and Malik Associates Chartered Accountants & CMAs (Managing Director, Pakistan) — while simultaneously managing the full financial function for a five-branch F&B group in Abu Dhabi.

UAE Finance & Tax Expertise

At Aptitude Café & Eatery, I architect and operate FP&A frameworks across five branches — producing branch-level P&L statements, management accounts, KPI dashboards, and variance analyses for senior stakeholders. I manage UAE VAT compliance end-to-end under the Federal Tax Authority (FTA) framework, including EmaraTax return filings, input tax reconciliations, voluntary disclosures, and regulatory advisory. I have led ERP implementations on SAP Business One, Oracle Financial EBS R12, and QuickBooks — designing chart of accounts, automated payroll workflows, and inventory valuation modules from scratch.

Pakistan Regulatory & Tax Knowledge

Through Malik Associates, I maintain active expertise in Pakistan’s regulatory landscape: direct income tax planning and filing under the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) framework, Sales Tax Act 1990 compliance, corporate secretarial work under the Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan (SECP), and statutory audit under ICAP standards.

Strategic & Executive Competencies

  • Multi-entity financial control: concurrent oversight of transport, accounting firm, and F&B group P&Ls
  • IFRS & IAS compliant reporting with full audit-readiness across all managed entities
  • Cash flow modelling, rolling 13-week forecasts, and treasury management including WPS, bank facilities, and gratuity provisions
  • Transfer pricing documentation and cross-border tax structuring for GCC and Pakistan entities
  • Board-ready management accounts: executive dashboards, sensitivity analyses, and scenario planning models
  • ERP expertise: SAP B1, Oracle EBS R12, Microsoft Dynamics GP, QuickBooks, PeachTree, Tally

Core Competencies

What I Do Best

Tap any area to read a detailed breakdown — built across multi-branch F&B, GCC & Pakistan tax advisory, ERP implementation, and executive leadership.

📊
FP&A & Management Reporting
Multi-branch P&L, KPI dashboards, variance analysis
+

I design and operate full FP&A frameworks for multi-entity environments, from structured chart of accounts through monthly branch-level P&L production to executive management packs delivered to boards.

  • Branch-level P&L statements for five concurrent F&B outlets with zero month-end errors
  • Rolling 12-month budget models with quarterly reforecast cycles
  • Actual vs Budget variance analysis with root-cause commentary
  • KPI dashboards: revenue per cover, gross margin %, labour cost %, EBITDA by branch
  • Weekly flash reports for senior management decision-making
  • Cash flow forecasting including 13-week rolling models
  • Sensitivity and scenario analysis for capex and strategic decisions
🧾
UAE VAT & FTA Compliance
End-to-end FTA returns, input tax, advisory
+

I have managed UAE VAT compliance from the ground up for in-house entities and advisory clients across F&B, professional services, trading, and real estate. Record: zero FTA penalties across all managed entities.

  • VAT registration and deregistration with the Federal Tax Authority via EmaraTax
  • Periodic VAT return preparation and filing
  • Input tax reconciliation and reclaim management
  • Voluntary disclosure submissions for prior period corrections
  • Tax invoice compliance review and documentation audits
  • Ongoing regulatory advisory as UAE VAT rules evolve
  • VAT health checks for businesses ahead of first FTA audit
🏛
Corporate Tax & Pakistan FBR
UAE CT, transfer pricing, FBR, SECP compliance
+

My tax expertise spans two jurisdictions. In the UAE, I manage Corporate Tax under the Ministry of Finance CT framework introduced in 2023. In Pakistan, I handle FBR direct/indirect tax and SECP corporate regulatory work through Malik Associates.

  • UAE Corporate Tax registration, computation, and return filing
  • Transfer pricing documentation and arm’s length analysis
  • Tax planning and structuring to optimise effective tax rates
  • Pakistan FBR: income tax returns (Companies, AOPs, Individuals), advance tax, withholding tax statements
  • Pakistan Sales Tax Act 1990: SRB, FBR, PRA registration and returns
  • SECP: company incorporation, annual filings, Form A/29, change of directorship
  • Regulatory submissions to ADGM, DIFC, and UAE Ministry of Economy
⚙️
ERP Implementation & Automation
SAP B1, Oracle R12, QuickBooks, Dynamics GP
+

I have led ERP implementations as functional architect — designing workflows, testing data migration, and training end users — across four platforms and multiple sectors.

  • SAP Business One: chart of accounts, multi-branch cost centres, automated payroll, inventory valuation (FIFO/Weighted Average)
  • Oracle Financial EBS R12.2: GL, AP, AR, Fixed Assets modules; period-close and sub-ledger reconciliation
  • Microsoft Dynamics GP: budget vs actual reporting, inter-company eliminations
  • QuickBooks Online & Desktop: multi-currency, class tracking, payroll module setup
  • Data migration: chart of accounts mapping, opening balance verification, parallel-run reconciliation
  • Month-end close automation: reducing close cycle from 10 days to 3 days
💰
Treasury, Payroll & Cash Flow
WPS, gratuity, bank facilities, procurement
+

I manage the full treasury and operational finance function across multiple entities simultaneously — including payroll for 100+ employees, bank relationships, and working capital optimisation.

  • Monthly payroll processing for 100+ employees across five branches
  • WPS (Wages Protection System) file generation and Central Bank submission
  • Gratuity provision calculation, accrual accounting, and end-of-service settlement
  • Bank reconciliations across multiple AED and FCY accounts
  • Trade facility management: overdrafts, letters of credit, bank guarantees
  • Procurement: vendor onboarding, purchase order approval, 3-way matching, payment runs
  • Inventory valuation and stock count reconciliation for F&B environments
🚀
Executive Leadership & Strategy
CEO, MD, multi-entity P&L, board reporting
+

Beyond technical finance, I operate as a business leader daily as CEO of Imperial Transport LLC and MD of Malik Associates. This dual executive experience combined with my finance career makes me highly effective at bridging finance and business strategy.

  • Full P&L ownership across two companies alongside senior employment
  • Strategic planning: annual business plans, market analysis, competitive positioning
  • Investor-ready financial modelling and business case preparation
  • Finance team leadership: recruitment, performance management, KPI-setting
  • Stakeholder management: banks, auditors, regulatory authorities, senior management
  • Board-level presentation: monthly management packs, quarterly reviews, annual reports
  • UAE and Pakistan business setup advisory: licensing, PRO, corporate structuring
Career

Professional Journey

7+ years of progressive finance leadership across the UAE and Pakistan.

Group AccountantJan 2025 – Present
Aptitude Café & Eatery · Multi-Branch F&B · Abu Dhabi, UAE
  • Lead FP&A and budgeting across five branches; branch-level P&L, variance reports, and executive KPI dashboards for senior stakeholders.
  • Administer UAE VAT compliance end-to-end: FTA return filing via EmaraTax, input tax reclaims, and ongoing advisory.
  • Drive cost reduction via procurement optimisation and inventory valuation — improving gross margins materially.
  • Manage monthly payroll, WPS submissions, gratuity provisions in full compliance with UAE Labour Law.
Financial AccountantApr 2024 – Dec 2024
Ratio Accounting and Financial Advisory · Abu Dhabi, UAE
  • Full-cycle accounting and financial reporting for a multi-sector client portfolio spanning F&B, trading, and professional services.
  • UAE VAT registrations, periodic FTA filings, voluntary disclosures, and ongoing tax advisory.
  • Management accounts and budgets supporting client strategic planning and board presentations.
Deputy Head of FinanceJan 2023 – Dec 2023
Shaheed Bhutto Foundation · Islamabad, Pakistan
  • Supervised accounting and finance team; full-cycle operations, corporate taxation, and forecasting activities.
  • Delivered strategic financial insights and management reporting to executive leadership.
  • Led implementation of budgeting controls and variance reporting framework.
Assistant Manager – Tax & CorporateSep 2020 – Jan 2022
Now Consultants LLC · UAE
  • Corporate tax compliance, planning, and advisory for a diverse multi-sector client base across UAE and GCC.
  • Transfer pricing documentation, regulatory submissions, and corporate restructuring mandates.
Assistant Manager FinanceJan 2018 – Oct 2019
Mian Usman Umar & Company · Islamabad, Pakistan
  • Built accounting controls and financial reporting framework from the ground up.
  • Managed payroll, GL reconciliations, month-end close, and commercial bank credit facility management.
